title: C2 Processed record v0 (learn-loop MVP, ASR-first)
description: The processed life-stream record data-processing writes to storage /context (POST /context/records). One record per processed unit; v0 = one ASR transcript per audio chunk (a chunk MAY yield several records in later modalities, e.g. video keyframes). record_id is deterministic on (chunk_id, pipeline_version) so a reprocess under the same version is idempotent and a version bump forks a new record (version-forward reprocessing). Storage persists verbatim, time-indexed on (user_id, t_start), and assigns its own ingest_time + user-local timezone (NOT carried here). enrichments is present-but-empty in v0 (like C4's empty trace arrays) so later diarization / world-data enrichment never change the shape.

record_id.description: Stable id for this processed record; the dedup/idempotency key for the /context write. MUST be a deterministic function of the source chunk_id and pipeline_version (e.g. a hash): byte-identical across every (re)processing of the same chunk under the same pipeline_version — so a reprocess is an idempotent /context upsert, not a duplicate — and different under a bumped pipeline_version (version-forward reprocessing forks a new record). Where one chunk yields multiple records (e.g. video keyframes, original+translation), fold a within-chunk discriminator into the id so each is stable and distinct.

chunk_id.description: The C1 chunk this record was processed from (provenance).

blob_ref.description: The /raw ref carried forward from C1; the raw bytes remain the source of truth.

source.description: Provenance back to the raw chunk in /raw.

t_start.description: Wall-clock span start, RFC3339 UTC, carried from C1. The time-spine axis storage indexes on.

t_end.description: Wall-clock span end, RFC3339 UTC, carried from C1.

kind.description: v0 = 'transcript' (ASR). 'caption'/'ocr' arrive with the vision pipeline; 'text' is the normalized-text modality (extension/clipboard/typed capture).

text.description: The full processed text (ASR transcript in v0).

t_start.description: Segment start, RFC3339 UTC (absolute = chunk t_start + ASR offset).

speaker.description: Diarization label; required-nullable, always null in v0 (no diarization yet) so the key never appears/disappears when diarization lands.

segments.description: Optional finer-grained ASR timing (the time-spine payload). Present in v0; may be omitted if the ASR run produced no segments.

speakers.description: Diarization speaker identities, once diarization lands. Empty in v0.

faces.description: Known-faces registry matches, once world-data enrichment lands. Empty in v0.

places.description: Geo/place tags, once world-data enrichment lands. Empty in v0.

objects.description: Object tags, once world-data enrichment lands. Empty in v0.

enrichments.description: Present-but-empty in v0; shape stable so world-data enrichment never changes C2.

pipeline_version.description: data-processing pipeline version that produced this record; continuum trains on consistent dialects, reprocessing is version-forward.

processed_at.description: When data-processing produced this record, RFC3339 UTC (distinct from storage's ingest_time).
